subject: Correction to GRB name for Swift trigger 903845
submitter: Michael Moss at George Washington U  <mikejmoss3@gmail.com>
body:
M. J. Moss (GWU) reports on behalf of the Swift team:

The GRB name reported in M. J. Moss et al. GCN Circ. #24553  (Swift trigger
number: 903845) should be GRB 190515B.

We apologize for any confusion caused.
